description: Senior in fall with a 6-school list (T20 reaches, targets, safety). The densest application surface — exercises every translation path including UC group treatment.
business_rationale: Validates the make-or-break moment of the user journey: a senior in active application crunch with a balanced reach/target/safety list. This is when the dashboard must surface every overdue deadline, render the right per-school submission tasks, and group the UCs correctly — the densest exercise of the roadmap engine in production.
tests: Resolver picks senior_fall — the densest template
6 colleges (2 UCs trigger group treatment, 4 individual) added without errors
Per-school RD submission tasks emit artifact_ref pointing at college cards
UC group task labels all participating UCs
